details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest men's haircut after 5 PM next Friday at Downtown
Task 2: Create grooming cart with 3 products under $25 and subtotal <= $60
Task 3: Add $75 digital gift card and proceed to checkout review
Task 4: Choose longer package under $70 and start booking flow
Task 5: Book beard trim (or equivalent) with high-rated barber and add hot towel add-on
Task 6: Schedule combined haircut and facial under 90 minutes and $100
Task 7: Start booking at location open past 7 PM on Thursdays near ZIP 10001
Task 8: Select monthly membership with beard trims under $70 and go to review
Task 9: Save two beard care articles to reading list and verify
